title: datura fastuosa var. alba
intro: Datura fastuosa var. alba, also known as White Angel's Trumpet, is a variety of the Datura fastuosa plant, a flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a sedative and anxiolytic, due to its alkaloids, which have a calming effect on the nervous system. The health benefits of Datura fastuosa var. alba include reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Datura fastuosa var. alba can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and extracts, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it, as it can be toxic in large quantities.
